titleStmt.title: SII 28.281: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 281. (A.R. No. 435 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north base of the maṇḍapa in front.

This is a record of a political compact through which Cheṅgkēṇi Ammai Appaṉ Aḻagiya-chōḻa-chchambuvarāyaṉ had sought to ensure that Aiyyar Poṉparappiṉa-vāṇakōvaraiyar, Aiyyar Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-vāṇakōvaraiyar, and brother-in-law (maichchunanār) Kāḍavarāyar looked upto him without doing any wrong to him and himself undertook to reciprocate and do no wrong to them. If ever he failed in honouring this compact and did harm to them, he could be deemed to be the bearer of the sandals and betel box of his enemies and not as the son of his father. He swore on this taking the name of Pallavaraiyaṉ. The compact document was to be inscribed on the walls of the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Āṟagaḷūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5vatu Aiyyar
poṉparappiṉa vāṇakovarayarkkum Aiyyar kulottuṅka coḻa vāṇakovarayarkkum
maiccuṉaṉār kāṭavarāyarkkum ceṅkeṇi Ammai Appaṉ Aḻakiya coḻaṉāṉa Etirili coḻacca
mpuvarāyaneṉ Āṟakaḷūril tirukkāmicuramuṭaiyār koyilile tappāmaikku Aparamuṟaimai col
likkallu veṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṉakkum Eṉa taṟaikkum Ivarkaḷ virotamāyi tappaṉa Oḻu
ytal ceyvittal ceyyātey Eṉṉai nokka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷukku nāṉ Uḷḷataṉaiyu
m Orunāḷum tappāte Irukka kaṭaveṉākavum tappiṉenākil Eṅkaḷukku Iṉṉātarāy va
rukiṟa mummalarāyarkaḷukkum maṟṟum Eṉ catturukkaḷāyiruppārkaḷukkum ceruppum tampulamu
m Eṭuttenākiṟeṉ pallavaraiyaṉ cattiyamey Ippaṭi tappi nokil Appāṇ
ṭārkku piṟantilenākiṟeṉ Ippaṭikku kallu veṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Etirilicoḻac cam
puvarāyaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 28.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
